text: I was recently diagnosed with type 2 diabetes and my doctor put me on metformin. I've been experiencing stomach cramps and diarrhea for the past week. Is this normal? Should I stop taking the medication?
My mother was just told she has early-stage Alzheimer's. I feel completely overwhelmed and don't know how to cope. Has anyone else gone through this with a parent?
I've been having persistent lower back pain for about 3 months. I've tried ibuprofen and stretching but nothing seems to help. What kind of specialist should I see?
Can someone explain the difference between an MRI and a CT scan? My doctor ordered both and I'm confused about why I need two different imaging tests.
I just finished my last round of chemotherapy yesterday. I'm cancer-free but I feel so empty and scared. Everyone keeps telling me I should be happy but I just feel lost.
My 8-year-old has been complaining of headaches almost every day after school. He doesn't have vision problems according to his last eye exam. What else could be causing this?
I've been on 20mg of citalopram for anxiety for about 6 months and I want to stop taking it. Can I just quit cold turkey or do I need to taper off gradually?
Has anyone had success with physical therapy for frozen shoulder? My orthopedist recommended it but I've heard it can be very painful. What was your experience like?
I'm pregnant (12 weeks) and I've been having really bad morning sickness. I can barely keep any food down. At what point should I go to the emergency room?
My blood work came back showing elevated liver enzymes (ALT 85, AST 72). My doctor wants to repeat the test in a month. Should I be worried? I don't drink alcohol.
